'''100lt''' may refer to:

* [http://lxalliance.net/wiki/index.php/Limited Limited]
* [http://lxalliance.net/wiki/index.php/Unlimited Unlimited]

Also rarely:

* [http://lxalliance.net/wiki/index.php/Firebird Firebird]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721205136/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/100lt -->
